name: Habanero Pepper Sauce Aka"agent Orange
recipeIngredient: 12 Habernero peppers, stems removed, peppers chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic. Sauté until the onion is soft and translucent.
2. Add the chopped carrots to the skillet. Stir in a small amount of water, if needed, to prevent burning.
3. Increase the heat to high and bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and simmer until the carrots are tender, about 10-15 minutes.
4. Remove the saucepan from the heat. Add the pureed Habernero peppers and stir until well combined.
5. Pour in the distilled vinegar and lime juice. Stir to mix thoroughly.
6. Return the saucepan to medium-low heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Allow the sauce to cool slightly before transferring it to sterilized bottles. Seal tightly.
Heat index: 9 on a scale of 1-10
Yields 2 cups
